0.text: Increased lung parenchymal densities adjacent to pleural effusion consistent with atelectasis

1.text: Consolidation with air bronchograms in the anterior segment of the left upper lobe and lingula

2.text: Consolidation with air bronchograms in the anterior segment of the right upper lobe and right middle lobe

3.text: Nodular increases in centriacinar ground glass densities in the lower lobes of both lungs

4.text: Tree-in-bud appearance in some areas of the lower lobes

5.text: Hyperdense pleural surfaces in the lower lobe of the right lung secondary to pleurodesis
